description: Cretaceous era large fallen ancient tree log, moss-covered, partially decomposed. 4 meters long with weathered bark and ferns growing on it.

biome_placement.placement_notes: Place near river banks and in dense forest areas. Rotate randomly for natural look. Scale 0.8-1.2 for variety.

narrative_purpose: Environmental storytelling — suggests ancient forest age and decay cycle. Can be used as cover for player hiding from predators.
